summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 51 - Command Center, Live Market Data, and Holdings Management features. All 38 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Command Center page loads correctly with all expected sections (Total AUM, Compliance Score, Today's Schedule, Action Alerts, AI Cross-Client Insights, Quick Actions, Market Snapshot).

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on every page navigation - blocks interactions until dismissed. Consider showing only once per session or adding 'Don't show again' option.
Command Center navigation link only visible in Adviser Mode sidebar, but page is accessible via direct URL in Personal Mode. This may be intentional for role-based access.

critical_code_review_comments: Command Center API returns comprehensive daily digest with alerts, metrics, schedule, AI recommendations, and quick actions
Live Data API integrates with yfinance for real ASX stock data with fallback to mock data
Holdings Management API supports buy/sell transactions with proper cost basis tracking
All new routers properly included in server.py with /api prefix
Command Center page has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation includes Command Center in Adviser Mode Dashboard section with NEW badge

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Command Center page loads with all 7 sections verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data and in-memory storage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Command Center, Live Data, and Holdings Management features working correctly. Key APIs tested: /api/command-center/daily-digest, /api/command-center/alerts, /api/live/market-summary, /api/live/stock/{symbol}, /api/holdings/portfolio/{client_id}, /api/holdings/transaction, /api/holdings/performance/{client_id}. Existing wealth dashboard and compliance endpoints continue to work. Disclaimer modal still appears on every page load.

mocked_apis.Market_Data: LIVE via yfinance when available, MOCK fallback when unavailable
mocked_apis.AI_Features: REAL - Using Emergent LLM Key for AI Copilot

api_test_results.GET /api/holdings/performance/{client_id: PASS - Returns holdings performance with winners/losers

frontend_test_results./command-center: PASS - Page loads with Command Center title, Total AUM ($21,260,000), Compliance Score (93.2%), Today's Schedule (3 meetings), Action Alerts (12 total), AI Cross-Client Insights, Quick Actions, Market Snapshot, Refresh button, AI Copilot button
